workItem.author: darkfactory-bot
workItem.title: Add prompt content for the auditor role

policy.branching: One worker = one issue = one branch = one PR; branch df/<issue>-<slug> from dev.
policy.enforcement: All merges require green CI and the configured review gate; never force-push or bypass gates.

facts: The PR branch is pushed and CI is configured.

output.schema: Return the commands run, their results, and a pass or fail verdict.
